name: Chris Garratt
abilities: ★ Steep Tolls — none cross the bridges of Bayfield without paying the troll. He makes you play the tips, too — 630-yard par 5s, 240-yard par 3s.
Arrived 2024 with a howdy and a full bag. Best net 6th of 20 — provided he didn't "find" a few extra strokes back at the turn.
flavor: “I didn't know a group of people could be so proficient at consuming mushrooms — world class work, gentlemen.”
caption: Chris Garratt · Truffle Hogs 🐗
